creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Thu Sep 20 08:09:18 2012
New Revision: 304566
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304566

Log:
  Ghostery is your window into the invisible web - tags, web
  bugs, pixels and beacons that are included on web pages in
  order to get an idea of your online behavior.
  
  Ghostery tracks over 1,000 trackers and gives you a
  roll-call of the ad networks, behavioral data providers,
  web publishers, and other companies interested in your activity.
  
  WWW: http://www.ghostery.com
  
  PR:		169687
  Submitted by:	clutton <mbsd at isgroup.com dot ua>

Added:
  head/www/xpi-ghostery/
  head/www/xpi-ghostery/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/xpi-ghostery/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/xpi-ghostery/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/xpi-ghostery/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Thu Sep 20 08:07:00 2012	(r304565)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Thu Sep 20 08:09:18 2012	(r304566)
@@ -2066,6 +2066,7 @@
     SUBDIR += xpi-foxyproxy
     SUBDIR += xpi-gbrain
     SUBDIR += xpi-gdata_provider
+    SUBDIR += xpi-ghostery
     SUBDIR += xpi-gmail-manager
     SUBDIR += xpi-google-notebook
     SUBDIR += xpi-google_shortcuts

Added: head/www/xpi-ghostery/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/xpi-ghostery/Makefile	Thu Sep 20 08:09:18 2012	(r304566)
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+# Created by: clutton <mbsd@isgroup.com.ua>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	ghostery
+PORTVERSION=	2.8.0.1
+DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	-sm+fx
+CATEGORIES=	www
+
+MAINTAINER=	mbsd@isgroup.com.ua
+COMMENT=	Alerts/Block web bugs, ad and widgets
+
+XPI_NUM=	9609
+XPI_ID=		firefox@ghostery.com
+
+.include "${.CURDIR}/../xpi-adblock/Makefile.xpi"
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/xpi-ghostery/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/xpi-ghostery/distinfo	Thu Sep 20 08:09:18 2012	(r304566)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (xpi/ghostery-2.8.0.1-sm+fx.xpi) = 0cb107727df6e5f9c9097dc3b794af6ae342aa291e53cdc8b608968b66b542ce
+SIZE (xpi/ghostery-2.8.0.1-sm+fx.xpi) = 430234

Added: head/www/xpi-ghostery/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/xpi-ghostery/pkg-descr	Thu Sep 20 08:09:18 2012	(r304566)
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+Ghostery is your window into the invisible web - tags, web
+bugs, pixels and beacons that are included on web pages in
+order to get an idea of your online behavior.
+
+Ghostery tracks over 1,000 trackers and gives you a
+roll-call of the ad networks, behavioral data providers,
+web publishers, and other companies interested in your activity.
+
+WWW: http://www.ghostery.com
